hindi: जय सरस्वती माता, जय जय माँ। ज्ञान, संगीत, विद्या दाता॥
english: Victory to Mother Saraswati; bestower of knowledge, music and learning
roman: Jai Saraswati Mata, Jai Jai Maa, Gyan Sangeet Vidya Data

hindi: जय वागीश्वरी ज्ञान विधाता। हंस वाहिनी मोक्ष प्रदाता॥
english: Victory to Vagishwari, bestower of knowledge; swan-rider, granter of liberation
roman: Jai Vagishwari Gyan Vidhata, Hans Vahini Moksha Pradat

hindi: वेद पुराण विधि विस्तार। तुम्हीं दिए जग में प्रचार॥
english: The expansion of Vedas and Puranas; you gave them currency in the world
roman: Ved Puran Vidhi Vistar, Tumhin Diye Jag Mein Prachar

hindi: वीणा पुस्तक हाथ विराजे। श्वेत वस्त्र माँ सोहे साजे॥
english: Veena and book held in her hands; white garments adorn her beautifully
roman: Veena Pustak Hath Viraaje, Shwet Vastra Maa Sohe Saaje

hindi: विद्यार्थी जो तुम्हें ध्याता। ज्ञान और बुद्धि वो पाता॥
english: Students who meditate on you; attain knowledge and intelligence
roman: Vidyarthi Jo Tumhen Dhyata, Gyan Aur Buddhi Vo Pata

hindi: सरस्वती चालीसा जो गावे। विद्या बुद्धि सहज ही पावे॥
english: Whoever sings the Saraswati Chalisa; easily attains learning and wisdom
roman: Saraswati Chalisa Jo Gaave, Vidya Buddhi Sahaj Hi Paave

hindi: जय जय माँ सरस्वती भवानी। विद्या ज्ञान की तुम हो रानी॥
english: Victory to Mother Saraswati Bhavani; you are the queen of learning and wisdom
roman: Jai Jai Maa Saraswati Bhavani, Vidya Gyan Ki Tum Ho Rani
